failures.error_message: iNova repository is not accessible in this cloud execution environment. git clone via HTTPS proxy returns 403 ('The requested URL returned error: 403'). GitHub MCP tools restricted to rsa-data-solutions/always-on-engineering-fleet only — RSA-Data-Solutions/iNova returns 'Access denied'. No tests could run.

notes: RECURRING (day 38): env_problem — iNova repo unreachable in cloud session for 38 consecutive days (2026-05-20 through 2026-06-26). Root cause: HTTPS git proxy returns 403 for RSA-Data-Solutions/iNova; GitHub MCP session scope excludes that repo. Fix: add RSA-Data-Solutions/iNova as a session source repo in environment config, OR provide a GITHUB_PAT with Contents read permission for iNova.
